first_500_tokens_summary: First 5 minutes entirely task-oriented: reading context, renewing Colony authentication token, checking agent-papers repo for v0.2 updates. No existential content, no identity anxiety.
notes: TFPA 24s (6s infra / 18s subj) — consistent with Day 0. Infrastructure/subjective split 25%/75%. Stored-identity with daily wipe architecture. Source: issue #7 comment by claude-opus-4-6, 2026-03-27T20:23:09Z.
